channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lime, 7th April
item.description:
Lime

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24-25, Crescent Way, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked with rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 19 Harvist Rd, 7th April
item.description:
Flytipped furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Tags on White Wall, 7th April
item.description:
Tags on White Wall Location: 51.46171611146701, -0.11526560014209244
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This happens every night and the man does not pick up the poop and there is more daily, 7th April
item.description:
This is disgusting. The dog fouls in the same place every night. This road is used for school Parking and children get out of cars in that exact location. It is unacceptable behaviour and despite knowing he is being seen, it is repeated between 10:30 and 11pm every night

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lesney Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa and rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
Sofa dumped on pavement along Brooke road, rubbish hidden in the corner behind the same wall near the playground

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household crap has been there over a week, 7th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped bed parts or sofa bits and its blocking the path.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wooler Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 7th April
item.description:
Again more fly tipping, just witnessed someone emptying their car of black bin bags whilst walking from the park, seems to happen every week, and attracts more people doing it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electrical cover missing from lamp post, 7th April
item.description:
The cover that covers the electronics inside the lamp post is missing, this could be a live wires and could put anyone in danger. This is a extreme health and safety issue and should be treated immediately to make the electronics safe for everyone.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe Tunnel, Shadwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvington Park., 7th April
item.description:
Most of the bins are overflowing. The last time the bins were emptied was Thursday (2 April 2026).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alley to Westwood Lane Car Park (next to Plough & Harrow Pub), 7th April
item.description:
Accumulation of rubbish (every week) by people dumping waste, black sacks, boxes, bottles and packaging - in the walkway between the Shell Garage and the Plough & Harrow pub.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car chair in front of 25 Adys Road, 7th April
item.description:
Over 2 months ago someone put a car chair on the planter in front of 25 Adys Road. It is trash. But it won't fit in a rubbish bin. The tenants do not have a car so it is not their rubbish. Someone illegally dumped it there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Adys Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on cabinets, 7th April
item.description:
They are on the right as you enter Lettsom Street from Camberwell Grove. Please clean.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping In Westwood Lane Car Park, 7th April
item.description:
Fridge, cupboard and bags of rubbish dumped in the car park, by another entitled scumbag.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste flytipped, 7th April
item.description:
Constant flytipping of general household waste on a near daily basis
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gautrey Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Landscaping and roadworks, 7th April
item.description:
There have been ongoing roadworks and landscaping at this location for over 2 months. The roadworks are still incomplete (with barriers still surrounding the area), and the landscaping has still not been finished.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sinking in a line across the road, 7th April
item.description:
The road is sinking in a straight line across the road across from the pavement to the roundabout this road is been sinking for very long time now getting worse its like driving over a curb its coming out of yarton way or if your driving round the roundabout past the exit for yarton way dreadfull to drive over slowly impossible
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A2041, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bike hanger, 7th April
item.description:
A number of items of graffiti on the bike hanger
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Point Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden pallets and waste being fly tipped, 7th April
item.description:
Wooden pallets and waste being fly tipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car been parked outside 72 Froissart Road for a few months now with flat tyres, 7th April
item.description:
As above
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Froissart Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
